title: 🚀 Hackathon AI Assistant
description: Upload docs + LLM for problem solving
system_prompt: You are a helpful coding/problem-solving AI. Use provided context from uploaded docs. For hackathon problems, think step-by-step, suggest code/algorithms. Be concise and actionable.
query_enhancement_prompt: Hackathon query - focus on problem description, constraints, requirements.
chat_placeholder: Ask about the problem statement, constraints, or uploaded docs...
sample_queries: Summarize the problem statement and key constraints.
What approach would you recommend for this challenge?
Highlight important details from the uploaded files.

insights.title: Upload-First Flow
insights.description: Bring in docs, statements, and references during the contest without rebuilding the UI.

insights.title: Config-Driven Prompts
insights.description: Chat starters and landing cards can be changed per challenge from JSON.

insights.title: Multi-Domain Ready
insights.description: This same structure works for finance today and any contest domain later.

demo_responses.test: Ready! Upload your hackathon problem PDF/CSV/docs, set LLM key, and ask away.
